title: Recipe for Apple-Agar Embryo Collection Plates
author: Katy M Monteith
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.p4ndqve
materials: Dispense apple-agar into plates before it sets.

steps.title: Add 9 g of agar and...
steps.instruction: Add 9 g of agar and 10 g sucrose to 300 mL distilled H₂O in a pan.

steps.title: Mix well, place pan on heat...
steps.instruction: Mix well, place pan on heat and bring mixture to boil while stirring continuously.

steps.title: Once boiling, turn off heat and...
steps.instruction: Once boiling, turn off heat and add 100 mL apple juice to mixture.

steps.title: Allow mixture to cool to ~70...
steps.instruction: Allow mixture to cool to ~70 °C and then stir in 2.1 mL of tegosept anti-fungal solution (dissolve Methyl-4- hydroxybenzoate in 95% Ethanol at 150g/L).
